sections.text:
## Symptoms
Audit log retention is set to 30 days but SOC 2 requires 12 months. Need to pipe to S3 Glacier.

## Diagnosis
Synthetic uptime check is failing because the TLS certificate was renewed but the CA bundle wasn't updated. Prometheus query for p99 latency returns NaN when the service has < 30 requests in the window.

## Remediation
PagerDuty integration is missing the severity field on alerts coming from Alertmanager. OpenTelemetry span attribute `http.status_code` is missing from the ingress traces.

## Verify
Distributed tracing across our Go → Rust gRPC boundary is not propagating trace context.

documents.semantic_id: Runbook: WebAuthn passkey enrollment fails on Safari 17 when the user has multiple resident credentials registered

sections.text:
## Symptoms
Service accounts need to support client_credentials grant for the new partner integration.

## Diagnosis
WebAuthn passkey enrollment fails on Safari 17 when the user has multiple resident credentials registered. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.

## Remediation
OIDC discovery URL returns 502 from behind the load balancer; the health check path is wrong. Password reset tokens are not being invalidated after a successful reset — they remain valid for 15 minutes.

## Verify
Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout.

sections.text:
## Symptoms
Connection pool exhaustion at peak — pgbouncer is set to 100 but we're seeing 120 concurrent connections.

The users_org_idx partial index is not being used by the planner on the member-list query.

documents.semantic_id: Runbook: Retrieval augmentation: we're pulling top-50 chunks but the LLM context window is 128k — room to spare

sections.text:
## Symptoms
Cost per 1M tokens for text-embedding-3-large is $0.13; fine-tuning Qwen is $0.007 per 1M. 18x cheaper.

## Diagnosis
Vector DB cost projection at 10M chunks: $340/mo on LanceDB with IVF_PQ, $1200 on Pinecone. Evaluation harness: 500 labeled queries, we A/B test embedding models nightly against this set.

## Remediation
Fine-tuning Qwen3-Embedding-4B on our internal ticket corpus improved retrieval P@10 by 3.2 points. LoRA adapter size for the intent classifier is 40MB; inference on the edge is fine, cold start is not.

## Verify
Red-team findings: 3 prompt-injection patterns that bypass our system prompt. Mitigations in review.

sections.text:

The reranker is returning identical scores for candidates with very different content — the model is clipping. Permission sync for Confluence is 4 hours behind because the cursor-based pagination hit a rate limit.

Permission sync for Confluence is 4 hours behind because the cursor-based pagination hit a rate limit.

## Symptoms
StatefulSet volume claim template was changed but existing PVCs aren't being updated — they need to be recreated.

## Diagnosis
The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels. CronJob for nightly ETL is overlapping because concurrencyPolicy was left at the default Allow.

## Remediation
NetworkPolicy default-deny was applied to the staging namespace and broke the egress to the DB. Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node.

## Verify
Rolling deployments are causing a 2-3 second error spike because readiness probes lag behind container start.

documents.semantic_id: Runbook: Reindexing from scratch is the only way to change embedding models. Need a zero-downtime migration path

sections.text:
## Symptoms
Idempotency cache is evicting entries too fast — we're seeing double-ingests on Nango webhook retries.

## Diagnosis
GitHub private repo docs are leaking into public search because the access_type wasn't set at ingest. The reranker is returning identical scores for candidates with very different content — the model is clipping.

## Remediation
Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well. Reindexing from scratch is the only way to change embedding models. Need a zero-downtime migration path.

## Verify
Idempotency cache is evicting entries too fast — we're seeing double-ingests on Nango webhook retries.

documents.semantic_id: Runbook: Vacuum is lagging on the events table — autovacuum thresholds are too conservative

sections.text:
## Symptoms
Postgres migration 0042 adds a NOT NULL column without a default; backfill will take 4 hours on prod.

## Diagnosis
The daily snapshot job failed because the backup role lost the SELECT grant on the new partitions. Connection pool exhaustion at peak — pgbouncer is set to 100 but we're seeing 120 concurrent connections.

## Remediation
JSONB query on the metadata column isn't hitting the GIN index. Query planner picks seq scan. pgBouncer transaction pooling breaks our use of SET LOCAL statement_timeout.

## Verify
Foreign key cascade on org_memberships is deleting audit entries — the constraint should be RESTRICT.

documents.semantic_id: Runbook: Onsite loop: 5 rounds, 45min each. System design, coding, coding, domain, behavioral

sections.text:
## Symptoms
Compensation bands for L4/L5/L6 engineers in SF vs NYC vs remote; updated quarterly.

## Diagnosis
Onsite loop: 5 rounds, 45min each. System design, coding, coding, domain, behavioral. Referral bonus: $5000 at start, $5000 at 6 months. Doubled for senior and staff hires.

## Remediation
Greenhouse ATS integration with Hiveloop for candidate tracking. Offer letters include equity vest schedule (4y, 1y cliff) and a 2y post-termination exercise window.

## Verify
Referral bonus: $5000 at start, $5000 at 6 months. Doubled for senior and staff hires.

documents.semantic_id: Runbook: The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels

sections.text:
## Symptoms
Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node.

## Diagnosis
Rolling deployments are causing a 2-3 second error spike because readiness probes lag behind container start. Ingress controller is returning 502s intermittently; config reload timing is racing with upstream rotation.

## Remediation
HPA keeps scaling up then immediately back down — the target CPU is oscillating around the threshold. NetworkPolicy default-deny was applied to the staging namespace and broke the egress to the DB.

## Verify
CronJob for nightly ETL is overlapping because concurrencyPolicy was left at the default Allow.

documents.semantic_id: Runbook: Capacity plan for Q3: we need 40% more headroom based on the last 90d growth curve

sections.text:
## Symptoms
SLO for IngestBatch: 99% of batches under 10s. Currently at 98.6% this month.

## Diagnosis
Runbook for the connector-pruner stuck-in-progress state: how to identify, kill, resume. DR drill scheduled next week: failover postgres from us-east-1 to us-west-2, expected RTO 10m.

## Remediation
Chaos day: we want to kill 30% of replicas in staging and see if the SLO holds. The 2026-04-17 incident: BGP flap at the edge took us down for 9 minutes. Postmortem draft attached.

## Verify
Capacity plan for Q3: we need 40% more headroom based on the last 90d growth curve.

documents.semantic_id: Runbook: Log volume doubled this week — Loki ingestion is near quota. Need to audit verbose logs from the new service

sections.text:
## Symptoms
Synthetic uptime check is failing because the TLS certificate was renewed but the CA bundle wasn't updated.

## Diagnosis
Error budget dashboard shows we've burned 40% of the monthly budget already; it's the 8th. Log volume doubled this week — Loki ingestion is near quota. Need to audit verbose logs from the new service.

## Remediation
SLO burn-rate alert is too noisy during weekends. Multi-window multi-burn-rate policy needed. Log volume doubled this week — Loki ingestion is near quota. Need to audit verbose logs from the new service.

## Verify
PagerDuty integration is missing the severity field on alerts coming from Alertmanager.
